form.formComment: Won two starts back over 407m at this track. Last start he finished 5th on April 12 over 407m at this track behind Rachel Sparkles beaten 5.5 lengths (24.17) in a Grade 4. Draw likely to suit. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.
